data.name: Dominated by: Yandere Goth Weeb Bully 2
data.detailed_description:
This game is a sequel to "Dominated by: Yandere Goth Weeb Bully."

After being bullied and drained by Kurowa, your 268cm tall, sadistic, abusive, yandere goth bully, her equally sadistic, 271cm tall, yandere goth mom returns from her jog and finds out that you told Kurowa that you don't ogle her. Determined to prove you wrong, your sadistic bully and her mom decide to mercilessly bully and cocktease you to get you to admit that you love their bodies and ogle them. And for a hyper-masochist like you, being bullied into submission is a heavenly pleasure.

Experience a day in the shower with your giant, sadistic, yandere goth bully and her mom, who know that you love being teased and bullied by them.

  • ~1.5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 20 Unique character images

  • 22 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
